allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./schools-flats/schools.json'\); const s = d.schools.find\(s => s.name.includes\('1329'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./schools.json'\); const s = d.schools.find\(s => s.name.includes\('1329'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./schools.json'\); const total=d.schools.reduce\(\(s,sc\)=>s+sc.buildings.length,0\); const missing=d.schools.filter\(sc=>sc.buildings.length===0\).length; console.log\('Total buildings:',total,'  Schools with results:',\(400-missing\),'/ 400  Missing:',missing\);")
